warning_message: Never switch antibiotics without doctor advice. Wrong antibiotic can cause resistance.
recommendation: Consult your doctor or pharmacist before considering any switch

warning_message: Psychiatric medications require careful monitoring. Switching can cause serious withdrawal.
recommendation: Never switch antidepressants without psychiatrist supervision

warning_message: Epilepsy medicines require therapeutic drug monitoring. Switching brands can trigger seizures.
recommendation: Never switch epilepsy medication without neurologist approval

warning_message: Thyroid medicines require precise dosing. Even small changes affect hormone levels.
recommendation: Never switch thyroid medication without endocrinologist approval

warning_message: Steroids require careful tapering and monitoring. Self-switching is dangerous.
recommendation: Always consult doctor before changing steroid medication

warning_message: Blood pressure medicines can be switched but monitor BP closely for 2 weeks.
recommendation: Switch only with pharmacist guidance and monitor blood pressure daily

warning_message: Diabetes medicines can be switched but blood sugar must be monitored carefully.
recommendation: Switch only with doctor knowledge and monitor blood sugar daily

warning_message: Cholesterol medicines are generally switchable but inform your doctor.
recommendation: Inform your doctor when switching cholesterol medication

warning_message: Beta blockers affect heart rhythm. Switching requires medical supervision.
recommendation: Consult cardiologist before switching heart medications

warning_message: Blood thinners are critical for heart patients. Never self-switch.
recommendation: Always consult cardiologist before changing blood thinner medication

warning_message: Pain and fever medicines with same salt are safely interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch to generic with same salt and dosage

warning_message: NSAIDs with same salt can be switched. Avoid if you have stomach issues.
recommendation: Safe to switch. Take with food to avoid stomach irritation

warning_message: Allergy medicines with same salt are safely interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch to generic equivalent

warning_message: Acidity medicines with same salt are generally interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch. Same salt means same effectiveness

warning_message: Antacids are generally safe to switch between brands.
recommendation: Safe to switch to any equivalent antacid

warning_message: Vitamins and supplements are always safe to switch to generic.
recommendation: Always safe to buy generic supplements. Save money freely

warning_message: Topical antifungals with same salt are interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch topical antifungal creams

warning_message: Deworming medicines with same salt are interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch deworming medication

warning_message: Asthma inhalers require specific device training. Switching needs guidance.
recommendation: Consult pulmonologist before switching inhaler brands

warning_message: Cold medicines with same composition are interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch cold medicines with same ingredients

warning_message: Anti-nausea medicines with same salt are interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch anti-nausea medication

warning_message: Vein medicines with same salt are generally interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch with same salt composition

warning_message: Prostate medicines require careful dose adjustment.
recommendation: Consult urologist before switching prostate medication

warning_message: Lipid lowering medicines can be switched but inform your doctor.
recommendation: Inform doctor when switching lipid lowering medication

warning_message: Nasal sprays with same salt are safely interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch nasal decongestant sprays

warning_message: Topical pain gels with same salt are interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch topical pain relief gels

warning_message: Topical pain creams are generally interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch topical pain creams

warning_message: Antiseptics are generally interchangeable for wound care.
recommendation: Safe to switch antiseptic solutions

warning_message: Topical antibiotic creams with same salt are interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch topical antibiotic creams

warning_message: H2 blockers with same salt are safely interchangeable.
recommendation: Safe to switch acidity medicines
